title: rubus × subvelutinus
intro: Rubus × subvelutinus, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a type of black raspberry that is known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant contains anthocyanins, which have been found to have antioxidant properties and are used to prevent cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × subvelutinus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
